title: Velvety Nutty Scottish Corn Pie
description: A gluten-free, nut-laden puff pastry pie that melts in your mouth, with a golden crust and gooey, buttery filling.
instructions: In a bowl combine corn flour and salt and stir well.
Add cold butter cubes and rub into flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually pour cold water while mixing until the dough just comes together; shape into a disc and chill for 30 minutes.
In a small bowl whisk honey, oat milk, vanilla extract and almond flour to create a smooth glaze.
Roll the chilled dough into a rectangle, fold in thirds, chill again, then repeat this step twice to laminate the butter.
Preheat the oven to 200C and grease a ramekin.
Press the laminated dough into the ramekin, filling the bottom and up the sides; add the chopped nuts, grated cheese, and drizzle the glaze over the filling.
Bake for 25 minutes until the crust is golden and the filling is gooey; let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
